user.title: Welcome to AIVA
user.description: AIVA is installed in Home Assistant. To finish setup, name your home, choose your plan, and start activation.

awaiting_pairing.title: Linking code generated

awaiting_payment.title: Payment confirmation pending
awaiting_payment.description:
The link was received successfully. AIVA is now waiting for installation payment confirmation.

When the payment is confirmed, continue to complete activation.

error.cannot_connect: We could not connect to AIVA. Check the connection address and try again.
error.invalid_pairing_code: The linking code is no longer valid. Start activation again.
error.invalid_response: AIVA could not complete the request right now. Try again in a few minutes.
error.invalid_scan_interval: The minimum allowed interval is 30 seconds.
error.missing_required_data: Some activation details are missing. Start the process again.
error.pairing_pending: We have not received the link yet. Enter the code in the activation channel provided by AIVA and try again.
error.payment_pending: The installation payment has not been confirmed yet. Try again after you receive confirmation.
error.unknown: We could not complete activation. Try again in a few minutes.

abort.already_configured: AIVA is already configured for this Home Assistant.

init.title: AIVA options
init.description: Adjust the AIVA connection and update frequency.

error.invalid_scan_interval: The minimum allowed interval is 30 seconds.
